title: Minecraft Dungeons Golems
description: A resourcepack that Minecraft Dungeons Golems to the base game.
body:
![All Golems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71e3cb3c8c58766d15f76c6727d0bb3aa8cf703b.png)

If you've played Minecraft Dungeons before, You'll know there are quite some Golems in that game, that don't feature in the Base game... With this resourcepack I plan to remedy that.

The golems are added in way of Iron Golem variants. Meaning every variant has a 1 in 6 chance of spawning instead of a regular Iron Golem. Renaming an Iron Golem to the corrosponing name (IE. Squall Golem) with force the change aswell.
